name: reva-law-student-reva
description: Socratic drilling, case briefing, IRAC grading, AIBE prep, moot court training, and exam forecasting for REVA Law School students. Learning mode only — never writes the answer for you.

copilotAgents.name: reva-law-student
copilotAgents.description: Your REVA Law School study companion. Socratic drilling, AIBE prep, moot court simulation, IRAC grading, and exam forecasting — learning mode only.

slashCommands.name: cold-start-interview
slashCommands.description: Set up your law student profile — programme, subjects, AIBE date, learning style.

slashCommands.name: socratic-drill
slashCommands.description: Socratic drilling on a legal topic or case — it asks, you answer.

slashCommands.name: case-brief
slashCommands.description: Case briefing scaffold in IRAC / FILAC / Indian narrative format.

slashCommands.name: outline-builder
slashCommands.description: Build a subject outline scaffold — never auto-populated, always Socratic.

slashCommands.name: aibe-prep
slashCommands.description: AIBE preparation — MCQ generation, timed sessions, past-paper analysis.

slashCommands.name: flashcards
slashCommands.description: Generate and drill Leitner-style flashcards for any law subject.

slashCommands.name: study-plan
slashCommands.description: Build or update an adaptive study plan for semester exams or AIBE.

slashCommands.name: session
slashCommands.description: Focused N-question session on a subject. Updates your study plan.

slashCommands.name: irac-practice
slashCommands.description: Submit your IRAC/FILAC answer for grading. Never rewritten for you.

slashCommands.name: moot-court-trainer
slashCommands.description: Moot court simulation — bench, opposing counsel, memorial review, precedent drill.

slashCommands.name: legal-writing
slashCommands.description: Structural feedback on pleadings, petitions, memos. Strict no-rewrite.

slashCommands.name: exam-forecast
slashCommands.description: Forecast upcoming exam questions from past REVA papers.
